claim_results.claim: $\chi = \iiint(G \cdot M \cdot E \cdot S \cdot T \cdot K \cdot R \cdot Q \cdot F \cdot C)\,dx\,dy\,dt$ The Master Equation describes the coherence state $\chi$ of a reality system as the integral of ten coupled factors: Godhead (G), Measurement (M), Entropy/Sin (E·S), Time (T), Knowledge (K), Representation (R), Quantum state (Q), Fidelity (F), and Coherence (C) — with the conscious observer entering the equation through its $C$-state, not as a separate variable.

$\chi_{\text{restored}} = \text{Measure}_{\text{Christ}}(\chi_{\text{collapsed}}) \text{ where } I_f^{\text{Christ}} = 1$ The coherence is restored by a measurement performed by a high-coherence observer with perfect fidelity to the original Source specification—Christ as the Last Adam.
If the model is right, reality-making is not an intrinsic property of all conscious observers.
Paul names Christ the "last Adam" in 1 Corinthians 15:45 because the reset requires a second federal observer with perfect fidelity.
Christ does not merely repair Adam's collapse from the outside; he enters the system as the observer who can measure through the original basis without noise.
The claim lives or dies by whether a threshold relationship between observer fidelity, system specification, and collapse behavior can be made testable.
Every model is a projection of higher-dimensional reality onto a lower-dimensional surface we can comprehend.
We do not claim to have captured God in equations.
Where our model limits what God can be, the limitation is ours, not His.
Do not build public certainty on the exact equation until it can be tested outside the Genesis mapping.
Possible overstatement: federal headship is textually strong, but its physical mechanism is still a working model.
The useful result is a testable question: does observer fidelity to system specification ever change measurement weight?
This article proposes a candidate reason: collapse requires enough informational fidelity to the original boundary condition, plus the authority to measure for the system.
Rigor & Kill Conditions Every claim is held to explicit falsification standards.
Core variables and shorthand for the threshold model.
Every equation that appears in this article, collected in one place.

Note: $E$ and $S$ name the same quantity in different ontological frames (entropy / sin). $C$ is the framework's coherence variable, not a consciousness term — consciousness enters the equation through the observer's own $C$-state.
Plain English: Adam's measurement carried full specification authority because his channel was clean.

The Cross — Restoration via Perfect Fidelity $$\chi_{\text{restored}} = \text{Measure}_{\text{Christ}}(\chi_{\text{collapsed}}) \text{ where } I_f^{\text{Christ}} = 1$$ $\chi_{\text{collapsed}}$ = post-Fall coherence state. $\chi_{\text{restored}}$ = post-Cross coherence state.
Master Equation ($\chi$) The framework's central equation: total coherence as the integrated coupling of ten factors (G, M, E, S, T, K, R, Q, F, C).
Same Master-Equation variable, two coordinate names: "entropy" in the physics frame, "sin" in the theological frame.

Logos Field ($\chi$) The pervasive substrate of coherent reality — the framework's $\chi$ field; the Master-Equation field whose value is total system coherence. (Earlier drafts denoted this with $\Lambda$; that symbol is now reserved for the cosmological constant.) Field ≠ coupling : this entry locks the substrate sense.
